---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? What accessibility gap does it address?

## Proposed Solution
How you'd like it to work.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## WCAG Reference
If applicable, link to relevant WCAG success criteria.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or other context.
